title: Designing for Scalability vs. Performance
summary: I have made a short video about the difference between designing for scalability or performance. In other words, should you solve all capacity problems by throwing hardware at the problem? Or should you try to utilize the hardware you already have, better?
content: I have made a short video about the difference between designing for scalability or performance. In other words, should you solve all capacity problems by throwing hardware at the problem? Or should you try to utilize the hardware you already have, better?
